sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM p_trail_information_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_trail_information_t (cardnumber,personname,trailtype,sexes, parameter1,parameter2,parameter3,parameter4,parameter5, parameter6,parameter7,parameter8,parameter9,parameter10, parameter11,parameter12,parameter13,parameter14,parameter15, validflag,addoperator,addtime) VALUES ('$cardnumber$','$personname$',$trailtype$,'$sexes$', '$parameter1$','$parameter2$','$parameter3$','$parameter4$','$parameter5$', '$parameter6$','$parameter7$','$parameter8$','$parameter9$','$parameter10$', '$parameter11$','$parameter12$','$parameter13$','$parameter14$','$parameter15$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_trail_information_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM p_trail_information_t WHERE validflag>0 AND trailtype=$trailtype$
cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
personname like '%$personname$%'

SELECT * FROM p_trail_information_t WHERE validflag>0 AND trailtype=$trailtype$
cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
personname like '%$personname$%'
$sortsql$
ORDER BY id desc
